{{Quote|Tap was brave. I know since your father saved him from the fire you feel protective of the child.|[[Volt Vescuso]], to [[Julen Rakab]]|<ref name="A Crash of Fate" />}}
'''Tap''' was a young [[human]] [[Gender|male]] who lived in [[Black Spire Outpost]] on [[Batuu]], working as an [[Aide|assistant]] for the [[collector]] [[Dok-Ondar]].<ref name="A Crash of Fate" />

{{Char-stub}}
